rows.label: qev085401_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, if it isn't Mythos.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ah, Gwin-senpai!
And the members of Elma's team too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Nice to meet you.
I'm Lin Lee Kuu of Elma's team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0004
rows.name: Tatsu is Tatsu mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0005
rows.name: I'm Mythos, affiliated with Companion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0006
rows.name:
Gwin-senpai.
Why are you with Elma's team?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Ah.
I'm helping them with a mission right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Being a member of Irina's team is already amazing,
but you're even supporting Elma's team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yes.
Both Irina and I rely on him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0010
rows.name: E-eh?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0011
rows.name: That's so nice. If I could become an elite BLADE member like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0012
rows.name:
I probably wouldn't have to worry about
trivial failures, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hey, what's wrong?
This isn't like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0014
rows.name: Your energy was your only redeeming feature, wasn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Gwin-san.
Saying it's his "only" redeeming feature is terrible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Did something happen?
If we'll do, we can help you out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0017
rows.name:
No way!
I couldn't possibly ask elites like you all—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0018
rows.name: I'll solve it myself, so it's fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0019
rows.name: Mythos-san is pushing himself too hard mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0020
rows.name: Eh, why?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0021
rows.name: Tatsu can tell mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Those eyes are the eyes of someone worrying
about what to have for breakfast tomorrow mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well, it's not exactly that light
of a worry—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_JNK0010
rows.name: Leave

rows.label: qev085401_SEL0011
rows.name: Leave without forcing him.

rows.label: qev085401_JNK0020
rows.name: Forceful

rows.label: qev085401_SEL0021
rows.name: Press him to just talk about it.

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0024
rows.name: Wait, are we just going to leave him be?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0025
rows.name:
If he himself doesn't want to talk,
there's nothing we can do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0026
rows.name: But—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0026_2
rows.name: Mythos-san, are you really okay with that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0028
rows.name: That's right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0029
rows.name:
Then please just talk to yourself.
We'll pretend we're not listening![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0030
rows.name: Well— that's a bit—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0031
rows.name: Mythos, elites or whatever, that has nothing to do with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0032
rows.name:
We're fellow BLADE comrades.
Just tell us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0033
rows.name: Senpai—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0034
rows.name: Everyone—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0035
rows.name:
Understood. Please lend me your strength.
Could you take a look at this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Wow, how cute!
I love cats ♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0037
rows.name:
Is it called a cat mo?
Is it Lin-san's favorite food mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0038
rows.name: I would never eat a cat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0039
rows.name: What I wanted to ask is—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0040
rows.name:
Her name is Aisha,
and I want you to help me search for her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0041
rows.name: Eh, Aisha-chan has gone missing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0042
rows.name:
I'm truly sorry to bother you with
such a trivial matter, but—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0043
rows.name: She hasn't come back since the day before yesterday.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0044
rows.name:
I understand you're worried, but
does this cat have anything to do with your mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0045
rows.name:
It's part of your Companion duties, isn't it?
This cat is a test subject for environmental research, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0046
rows.name: Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'm investigating whether Earth-native organisms
can adapt to this planet, Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0048
rows.name: What, that's a splendid mission, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0049
rows.name:
But compared to everyone who searches for Life Points
or fights against aliens—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_JNK0030
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev085401_SEL0031
rows.name: Yell at him to have some pride.

rows.label: qev085401_JNK0040
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: qev085401_SEL0041
rows.name: Speak about the roles each person has.

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0050
rows.name: That's right. Our missions are certainly dangerous, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0051
rows.name:
Just because it's dangerous doesn't mean it's
greater or more important.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0052
rows.name:
Gwin is right.
Everything is an activity for Earth's humanity to take root on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0053
rows.name: There is no need to feel inferior about your own mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0054
rows.name:
Exactly.
It's the right person for the right job![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0055
rows.name:
Lin is right.
You possess excellent investigative abilities that we lack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0056
rows.name:
It's fine for everyone to utilize their own qualities
in their respective missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0057
rows.name: Ah, thank you so much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0058
rows.name: Well then, let's start searching for Aisha-chan right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0059
rows.name:
Yes, but searching through all of NLA with just a name
seems like it will be backbreaking work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0060
rows.name: Are there any places this cat frequents?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0061
rows.name: Let me see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0062
rows.name:
I've already searched the parks and such that she would likely go to,
so what's left is—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0063
rows.name: Right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0064
rows.name:
Do you have anything with her scent on it?
Let's have Tatsu sniff it and search for her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0065
rows.name:
Lin-san!
Tatsu is not a police dog mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0066
rows.name: So you know what a dog is—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0067
rows.name: I don't know if this is a clue, but—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0068
rows.name:
Sometimes she comes home with something
like lubricating oil on her body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0069
rows.name: Washing it off is a real pain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0070
rows.name: Lubricating oil, huh—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0071
rows.name:
Places likely to use lubricating oil are
the Industrial Area or the lower levels of the BLADE Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0072
rows.name: Let's search the lower levels of the BLADE Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0073
rows.name:
I'll leave the Industrial Area to you, Mythos-san.
If we get any information, we'll head to the Industrial Area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085401_MSG0074
rows.name:
Yes, understood.
I'm sorry for the trouble, everyone, but please take care of it.[ST:wait ]
